mapper.select: SELECT PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_NAME, CATEGORY, PRICE, KCAL, SUGARS, PROTEIN, SODIUM, SAT_FAT, CAFFEINE, IMAGE_FILE FROM p024_drink WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{prodId}
SELECT PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_NAME, CATEGORY, PRICE, IMAGE_FILE FROM p024_food WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{prodId}
SELECT PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_NAME, CATEGORY, PRICE, IMAGE_FILE FROM p024_drink

SELECT sub.ROWNUM, sub.PRODUCT_ID, sub.PRODUCT_NAME, sub.CATEGORY, sub.PRICE, sub.IMAGE_FILE FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CATEGORY,PRODUCT_NAME) AS ROWNUM , PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_NAME, CATEGORY, PRICE, IMAGE_FILE FROM p024_drink )AS sub ORDER BY ROWNUM LIMIT #{records} OFFSET #{recordsOffset}
SELECT PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_NAME, CATEGORY, PRICE, IMAGE_FILE FROM p024_food
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO p024_users (LOGIN_EMAIL, LOGIN_PW, NAME, USER_TYPE) VALUES (#{LOGIN_EMAIL}, #{LOGIN_PW}, #{NAME}, "Cust")
INSERT INTO p024_users (LOGIN_EMAIL, LOGIN_PW, NAME, STORE_CODE, USER_TYPE) VALUES (#{LOGIN_EMAIL}, #{LOGIN_PW}, #{NAME}, #{STORE_CODE}, "Staff")
mapper.select: SELECT LOGIN_EMAIL, NAME, USER_TYPE, CREATED_AT, CASE WHEN USER_TYPE = 'Staff' THEN STORE_CODE ELSE NULL END AS STORE_CODE FROM p024_users WHERE LOGIN_EMAIL = #{LOGIN_EMAIL} AND LOGIN_PW = #{LOGIN_PW}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO p024_usercart(LOGIN_EMAIL, PRODUCT_ID, COUNT, STATUS_TYPE) VALUES (#{userId}, #{prodId}, 1, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE COUNT = COUNT + 1
mapper.select: SELECT B.PRODUCT_ID, B.PRODUCT_NAME, B.PRICE, A.COUNT, CONCAT('http://172.10.14.128:8088/edupack_egov/upload/p02/p024/', B.IMAGE_FILE) AS IMAGE_FILE FROM p024_usercart AS A INNER JOIN ( SELECT PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_NAME, PRICE, IMAGE_FILE FROM p024_drink UNION ALL SELECT PRODUCT_ID, PRODUCT_NAME, PRICE, IMAGE_FILE FROM p024_food ) AS B ON A.product_id = B.PRODUCT_ID WHERE A.login_email = #{userId}
SELECT STORE_CODE, STORE_NAME, ADDRESS FROM p024_store LIMIT 50
SELECT STORE_NAME, LAT, LON, ADDRESS FROM p024_store LIMIT 50
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO p024_storeorders ( ORDER_ID, STORE_CODE, LOGIN_EMAIL, PRODUCT_ID, COUNT, STATUS_TYPE ) SELECT #{orderId}, #{storeCode}, LOGIN_EMAIL, PRODUCT_ID, COUNT, 1 FROM p024_usercart WHERE LOGIN_EMAIL = #{userId}
INSERT INTO p024_userhist ( ORDER_ID, STORE_CODE, LOGIN_EMAIL, PRODUCT_ID, COUNT ) SELECT #{orderId}, #{storeCode}, LOGIN_EMAIL, PRODUCT_ID, COUNT FROM p024_usercart WHERE LOGIN_EMAIL = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT A.ORDER_ID, A.LOGIN_EMAIL, A.PRODUCT_ID, -- 드링크나 푸드 테이블 중 이름이 있는 쪽을 가져옴 COALESCE(B.PRODUCT_NAME, C.PRODUCT_NAME) AS PRODUCT_NAME, A.COUNT, A.STATUS_TYPE, A.ORDERED_AT FROM p024_storeorders A LEFT JOIN p024_drink B ON A.PRODUCT_ID = B.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN p024_food C ON A.PRODUCT_ID = C.PRODUCT_ID WHERE A.STORE_ID = #{strTopicId} ORDER BY A.ORDERED_AT DESC
